pids.name: Monitor Status This Driving Cycle
pids.name_zh: 本驾驶循环监测器状态
pids.description: Reports monitor enable status and completion status for the current driving/monitoring cycle. Enable: indicates when a monitor is disabled such that there is no easy way for the driver to allow the monitor to run (e.g. soak not long enough, max attempts exceeded, ambient temp too low/high, BARO too low, sensor failure). Shall not indicate disabled for operator-controlled conditions. Completion: same criteria as PID $01 except reset to not-complete upon starting a new monitoring cycle.
pids.description_zh: 报告当前驾驶/监测循环的监测器使能状态和完成状态。使能：指示监测器因驾驶员无法轻易控制的条件被禁用（如熄火浸泡时间不够、最大尝试/中止次数已超、环境温度过低/过高、气压过低、传感器故障）。不应因操作者可控条件而指示禁用。完成：标准与PID $01相同，但在开始新监测循环时重置为未完成。

items.label: MON_ENA_CONT
items.name: Enable and completion status of continuous monitors this cycle
items.name_zh: 本循环连续型监测器使能及完成状态

items.label: MON_ENA_NC
items.name: Enable status of non-continuous monitors this cycle
items.name_zh: 本循环非连续型监测器使能状态

items.label: MON_CMPL_NC
items.name: Completion status of non-continuous monitors this cycle
items.name_zh: 本循环非连续型监测器完成状态

bits.name: Misfire monitoring enabled
bits.name_zh: 失火监测使能

bits.name: Fuel system monitoring enabled
bits.name_zh: 燃油系统监测使能

bits.name: Comprehensive component monitoring enabled
bits.name_zh: 综合部件监测使能
bits.note: Shall always show enabled for SI and CI

bits.name: Ignition type
bits.name_zh: 点火类型
bits.note: Determines interpretation of bytes C and D

bits.name: Misfire monitoring complete this cycle
bits.name_zh: 本循环失火监测完成

bits.name: Fuel system monitoring complete this cycle
bits.name_zh: 本循环燃油系统监测完成

bits.name: Comprehensive component monitoring complete this cycle
bits.name_zh: 本循环综合部件监测完成

bits.name: Reserved
bits.name_zh: 保留

bits.name: Catalyst monitoring enabled (SI) / NMHC catalyst monitoring enabled (CI)
bits.name_zh: 催化器监测使能(SI) / NMHC催化器监测使能(CI)

bits.name: Heated catalyst monitoring enabled (SI) / NOx aftertreatment monitoring enabled (CI)
bits.name_zh: 加热催化器监测使能(SI) / NOx后处理监测使能(CI)

bits.name: Evaporative system monitoring enabled (SI) / Reserved (CI)
bits.name_zh: 蒸发系统监测使能(SI) / 保留(CI)
bits.note: CI: shall always be reported as 0

bits.name: Secondary air system monitoring enabled (SI) / Boost pressure system monitoring enabled (CI)
bits.name_zh: 二次空气系统监测使能(SI) / 增压系统监测使能(CI)

bits.name: Reserved
bits.name_zh: 保留

bits.name: Oxygen sensor monitoring enabled (SI) / Exhaust gas sensor monitoring enabled (CI)
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器监测使能(SI) / 排气传感器监测使能(CI)

bits.name: Oxygen sensor heater monitoring enabled (SI) / PM filter monitoring enabled (CI)
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器加热器监测使能(SI) / 颗粒过滤器监测使能(CI)

bits.name: EGR and/or VVT system monitoring enabled
bits.name_zh: EGR和/或VVT系统监测使能

bits.name: Catalyst monitoring complete this cycle (SI) / NMHC catalyst monitoring complete (CI)
bits.name_zh: 本循环催化器监测完成(SI) / NMHC催化器监测完成(CI)

bits.name: Heated catalyst monitoring complete (SI) / NOx aftertreatment monitoring complete (CI)
bits.name_zh: 加热催化器监测完成(SI) / NOx后处理监测完成(CI)

bits.name: Evaporative system monitoring complete (SI) / Reserved (CI)
bits.name_zh: 蒸发系统监测完成(SI) / 保留(CI)

bits.name: Secondary air system monitoring complete (SI) / Boost pressure system monitoring complete (CI)
bits.name_zh: 二次空气系统监测完成(SI) / 增压系统监测完成(CI)

bits.name: Reserved
bits.name_zh: 保留

bits.name: Oxygen sensor monitoring complete (SI) / Exhaust gas sensor monitoring complete (CI)
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器监测完成(SI) / 排气传感器监测完成(CI)

bits.name: Oxygen sensor heater monitoring complete (SI) / PM filter monitoring complete (CI)
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器加热器监测完成(SI) / 颗粒过滤器监测完成(CI)

bits.name: EGR and/or VVT system monitoring complete
bits.name_zh: EGR和/或VVT系统监测完成

pids.name: Control Module Voltage
pids.description: VPWR – power input to the OBD control module. Normally battery voltage less circuit voltage drop. 42V vehicles may have VPWR significantly different from battery voltage.
pids.description_zh: VPWR – OBD控制模块的电源输入。通常为电池电压减去线路压降。42V车辆的VPWR可能与电池电压有较大差异。

pids.name: Absolute Load Value
pids.description: LOAD_ABS is normalized air mass per intake stroke as percent. Calculated as air_mass / (1.184 × cyl_displacement). Ranges 0–95% NA, 0–400% boosted. Linearly correlated with indicated torque. At engine off / ignition on, LOAD_ABS = 0%.
pids.description_zh: LOAD_ABS是每进气冲程空气质量归一化百分比。计算公式：空气质量 / (1.184 × 气缸排量)。自然吸气范围0-95%，增压范围0-400%。与指示扭矩线性相关。发动机关闭/点火开启时LOAD_ABS=0%。

items.label: LOAD_ABS
items.name: Absolute Load Value
items.note: Typical max ~95% NA, ~400% boosted; theoretical max 25700%

pids.name: Fuel/Air Commanded Equivalence Ratio
pids.description: Conventional O2 sensor systems: commanded open loop F/A equivalence ratio (lambda); 1.000 in closed loop. Wide-range O2 systems: commanded lambda in both open and closed loop. Lambda > 1 is lean, < 1 is rich. If PID $4F supported and non-zero, calculate scaling per PID $4F definition.
pids.description_zh: 常规氧传感器系统：开环时为指令F/A当量比(lambda)，闭环时为1.000。宽域氧传感器系统：开环和闭环均为指令lambda。Lambda>1为稀，<1为浓。如支持PID $4F且非零，按PID $4F定义计算缩放。

pids.name: Relative Throttle Position
pids.description: Relative or learned throttle position, normalized 0–100%. Displays 0% at learned closed-throttle position. WOT usually substantially less than 100% due to closed-throttle offset.
pids.description_zh: 相对或学习节气门位置，归一化0-100%。在学习闭合位置显示0%。因闭合偏移，全开通常远低于100%。

pids.name: Ambient Air Temperature
pids.description: AAT shall display ambient air temperature if utilized by the control module for OBD monitoring. May be from sensor, vehicle serial data bus, or inferred from IAT etc.
pids.description_zh: AAT显示环境空气温度（如控制模块用于OBD监测）。可来自传感器、车辆串行数据总线或由IAT等推算。

pids.name: Absolute Throttle Position B
pids.description: Absolute throttle position B (not relative or learned), normalized 0–100%. Idle usually >0%, WOT usually <100%.
pids.description_zh: 绝对节气门位置B（非相对或学习），归一化0-100%。怠速通常>0%，全开通常<100%。

pids.name: Absolute Throttle Position C
pids.description: Absolute throttle position C (not relative or learned), normalized 0–100%.
pids.description_zh: 绝对节气门位置C（非相对或学习），归一化0-100%。

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position D
pids.description: Absolute accelerator pedal position D (not relative or learned), normalized 0–100%. Designation D matches DTC per SAE J2012.
pids.description_zh: 绝对加速踏板位置D（非相对或学习），归一化0-100%。标识D与SAE J2012的DTC对应。

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position E
pids.description: Absolute accelerator pedal position E (not relative or learned), normalized 0–100%. Designation E matches DTC per SAE J2012.
pids.description_zh: 绝对加速踏板位置E（非相对或学习），归一化0-100%。标识E与SAE J2012的DTC对应。

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position F
pids.description: Absolute accelerator pedal position F (not relative or learned), normalized 0–100%. Designation F matches DTC per SAE J2012.
pids.description_zh: 绝对加速踏板位置F（非相对或学习），归一化0-100%。标识F与SAE J2012的DTC对应。

pids.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator Control
pids.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器控制
pids.description: TAC_PCT normalized to max TAC commanded output. 0% = fully closed, 100% = fully open. Applies to linear/stepper motor or any other actuation method.
pids.description_zh: TAC_PCT归一化到最大节气门执行器指令输出。0%=全关，100%=全开。适用于直线/步进电机或任何其他驱动方式。

items.label: TAC_PCT
items.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator Control
items.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器控制

pids.name: Engine Run Time While MIL Activated
pids.name_zh: MIL激活期间发动机运行时间
pids.description: Reset to $0000 when MIL changes from deactivated to activated by this ECU. Accumulate minutes while MIL ON. Do not change while MIL OFF. Reset if cleared by Service $04 or 40 warm-ups without MIL. Does not wrap at $FFFF. Hybrid/engine-shutoff vehicles: increment after ignition on and engine running, or propulsion system active; continues even if engine turned off by vehicle control system.
pids.description_zh: 当MIL由本ECU从未激活变为激活时重置为$0000。MIL点亮期间按分钟累计。MIL熄灭时不变。通过Service $04清除或40次暖机无MIL后重置。达到$FFFF不回绕。混动/停机策略车辆：点火开启且发动机运行后递增，或驱动系统激活后递增；即使发动机被车辆控制系统关闭也继续递增。

items.label: MIL_TIME
items.name: Engine Run Time While MIL Activated
items.name_zh: MIL激活期间发动机运行时间

pids.name: Engine Run Time Since DTCs Cleared
pids.name_zh: 清除DTC后发动机运行时间
pids.description: Engine run time accumulated since DTCs were cleared. Not associated with any particular DTC. Remains at 65,535 min if exceeded; does not wrap. Hybrid/engine-shutoff vehicles: same increment rules as PID $4D.
pids.description_zh: 清除DTC后累计的发动机运行时间。不与特定DTC关联。超过65,535分钟后保持不回绕。混动/停机策略车辆：递增规则同PID $4D。

items.label: CLR_TIME
items.name: Engine Run Time Since DTCs Cleared
items.name_zh: 清除DTC后发动机运行时间

pids.name: External Test Equipment Configuration Information #1
pids.name_zh: 外部测试设备配置信息 #1
pids.description: Data A: max equivalence ratio for PIDs $24-$2B, $34-$3B, $44. If $00, use default 1.999/65535. Data B: max O2 sensor voltage for PIDs $24-$2B. If $00, use default 7.999V/65535. If PIDs $34-$3B supported, report $00. Data C: max O2 sensor current for PIDs $34-$3B. If $00, use default 128mA/32768. If PIDs $24-$2B supported, report $00. Data D: max MAP for PID $0B. If $00, use default 255kPa/255.
pids.description_zh: 数据A：PID $24-$2B、$34-$3B、$44的最大当量比。为$00则使用默认1.999/65535。数据B：PID $24-$2B的最大O2传感器电压。为$00则使用默认7.999V/65535。若支持PID $34-$3B则报告$00。数据C：PID $34-$3B的最大O2传感器电流。为$00则使用默认128mA/32768。若支持PID $24-$2B则报告$00。数据D：PID $0B的最大MAP。为$00则使用默认255kPa/255。

items.label: EQ_RAT_MAX
items.name: Maximum value for Equivalence Ratio
items.note: $00 = use default (1.999). Non-zero: new max value, scaling = A / 65535 per bit

items.label: O2S_V_MAX
items.name: Maximum value for Oxygen Sensor Voltage
items.note: $00 = use default (7.999V). Non-zero: new max voltage, scaling = B / 65535 V per bit

items.label: O2S_I_MAX
items.name: Maximum value for Oxygen Sensor Current
items.note: $00 = use default (128mA). Non-zero: new max current, scaling = C / 32768 mA per bit

items.label: MAP_MAX
items.name: Maximum value for Intake Manifold Absolute Pressure
items.name_zh: 进气歧管绝对压力最大值
items.note: $00 = use default (255kPa). Non-zero: new max = D×10 kPa, scaling = D×10/255 kPa per bit

pids.note: These values are not intended for display to the service technician. They are used by external test equipment to recalculate scaling.

pids.name: External Test Equipment Configuration Information #2
pids.name_zh: 外部测试设备配置信息 #2
pids.description: Data A: max MAF for PID $10. If $00, use default 655.35 g/s. Non-zero: new max = A×10 g/s, scaling = A×10/65535 g/s per bit. Data B, C, D: reserved, report as $00.
pids.description_zh: 数据A：PID $10的最大MAF。为$00则使用默认655.35 g/s。非零：新最大值=A×10 g/s，缩放=A×10/65535 g/s每位。数据B、C、D：保留，报告为$00。

items.label: MAF_MAX
items.name: Maximum value for Air Flow Rate from MAF Sensor
items.name_zh: MAF传感器空气流量最大值
items.note: $00 = use default (655.35 g/s). Non-zero: new max = A×10 g/s

pids.note: These values are not intended for display to the service technician.

pids.name: Type of Fuel Currently Being Utilized
pids.description: Fuel type currently in use. Single-fuel: static data. FFV: static (e.g. $03 Ethanol), use PID $52 for blend %. Bi-fuel: reports fuel currently in use. Hybrid states ($0F-$16) shall no longer be used. State $17 conflict between J1979/J1939 resolved with $18-$1C.
pids.description_zh: 当前使用的燃料类型。单燃料：静态数据。FFV：静态（如$03乙醇），用PID $52获取混合比。双燃料：报告当前使用的燃料。混动状态($0F-$16)不再使用。$17在J1979/J1939间的冲突已通过$18-$1C解决。

enums.name: Bi-fuel vehicle using battery [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 双燃料车辆使用电池 [不再使用]

enums.name: Bi-fuel vehicle using battery and combustion engine [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 双燃料车辆使用电池和内燃机 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle using gasoline engine [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆使用汽油发动机 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle using gasoline engine on ethanol [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆使用乙醇汽油发动机 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle using diesel engine [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆使用柴油发动机 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle using battery [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆使用电池 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle using battery and combustion engine [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆使用电池和内燃机 [不再使用]

enums.name: Hybrid vehicle in regeneration mode [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 混动车辆再生模式 [不再使用]

enums.name: Bi-fuel vehicle using diesel (J1979) / Natural Gas (J1939) [Not to be used]
enums.name_zh: 双燃料车辆使用柴油(J1979) / 天然气(J1939) [不再使用]
enums.note: Code $17 conflict between J1979 and J1939; shall no longer be used

enums.name: Bi-fuel vehicle using Natural Gas
enums.name_zh: 双燃料车辆使用天然气

enums.name: Dual Fuel – Diesel and NG
enums.name_zh: 双燃料 – 柴油和天然气

pids.name: Alcohol Fuel Percentage
pids.description: ALCH_PCT indicates percentage of alcohol (ethanol or methanol) in fuel blend supplied to combustion chamber. For FFV vehicles (e.g. E85 = 85%). Can be determined by sensor or inferred by fuel control software. Not required on single-fuel vehicles.
pids.description_zh: ALCH_PCT指示供给燃烧室燃料混合物中醇（乙醇或甲醇）的百分比。适用于FFV车辆（如E85=85%）。可通过传感器测定或由燃油控制软件推算。单燃料车辆不要求。

pids.name: Absolute Evap System Vapor Pressure
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气绝对压力
pids.description: Absolute evaporative system vapor pressure. Normally from FTP sensor or evap system vapor line sensor. Unsigned.
pids.description_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气绝对压力。通常来自油箱压力(FTP)传感器或蒸发系统蒸气管路传感器。无符号。

items.label: EVAP_VPA
items.name: Absolute Evap System Vapor Pressure
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气绝对压力

pids.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure (wide range)
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力（宽范围）
pids.description: Evaporative system vapor pressure with wider range than PID $32. Signed, 1 Pa per bit. Only one of PID $32, $54, or $A3 shall be supported.
pids.description_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力，比PID $32范围更宽。有符号，每位1 Pa。PID $32、$54、$A3仅可支持其中一个。

items.label: EVAP_VP2
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure (wide range)
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力（宽范围）

pids.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 1 / Bank 3
pids.name_zh: 短期二级氧传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组1 / 气缸组3
pids.description: Short Term Secondary Fuel Trim for spark ignition engines with secondary closed loop feedback. Bank 1 (Data A); Bank 3 (Data B, only if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 3). Reports 0% in open loop.
pids.description_zh: 使用二级闭环反馈的点火式发动机短期二级燃油修正。气缸组1(数据A)；气缸组3(数据B，仅当PID $1D指示气缸组3存在O2传感器时)。开环时报告0%。

items.label: STSO2FT1
items.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 1
items.name_zh: 短期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组1

items.label: STSO2FT3
items.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 3
items.name_zh: 短期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组3
items.note: Data B only included if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 3

pids.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 1 / Bank 3
pids.name_zh: 长期二级氧传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组1 / 气缸组3
pids.description: Long Term Secondary Fuel Trim for spark ignition engines with secondary closed loop feedback. Bank 1/3 correction stored in NVRAM/KAM. Reports correction in both open and closed loop. If no open loop correction utilized, reports 0%. If not utilized at all, PID shall not be supported.
pids.description_zh: 使用二级闭环反馈的点火式发动机长期二级燃油修正。气缸组1/3修正存储在NVRAM/KAM中。在开环和闭环均报告修正值。开环无修正则报告0%。完全不使用则不支持此PID。

items.label: LGSO2FT1
items.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 1
items.name_zh: 长期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组1

items.label: LGSO2FT3
items.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 3
items.name_zh: 长期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组3
items.note: Data B only included if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 3

pids.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 2 / Bank 4
pids.name_zh: 短期二级氧传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组2 / 气缸组4
pids.description: Short Term Secondary Fuel Trim for Bank 2 (Data A); Bank 4 (Data B, only if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 4). Reports 0% in open loop.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组2(数据A)和气缸组4(数据B，仅当PID $1D指示气缸组4存在O2传感器时)的短期二级燃油修正。开环时报告0%。

items.label: STSO2FT2
items.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 2
items.name_zh: 短期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组2

items.label: STSO2FT4
items.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 4
items.name_zh: 短期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组4
items.note: Data B only included if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 4

pids.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 2 / Bank 4
pids.name_zh: 长期二级氧传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组2 / 气缸组4
pids.description: Long Term Secondary Fuel Trim for Bank 2/4. Correction stored in NVRAM/KAM. Reports correction in both open and closed loop. If no open loop correction, reports 0%. If not utilized at all, PID shall not be supported.
pids.description_zh: 气缸组2/4的长期二级燃油修正。修正值存储在NVRAM/KAM中。在开环和闭环均报告修正值。开环无修正则报告0%。完全不使用则不支持此PID。

items.label: LGSO2FT2
items.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 2
items.name_zh: 长期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组2

items.label: LGSO2FT4
items.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Sensor Fuel Trim – Bank 4
items.name_zh: 长期二级O2传感器燃油修正 – 气缸组4
items.note: Data B only included if PID $1D indicates O2 sensor present in Bank 4

pids.name: Fuel Rail Pressure (absolute)
pids.description: FRP shall display fuel rail pressure at the engine when the reading is absolute. Intended for diesel and gasoline direct-injection systems with higher pressure range than PIDs $0A and $22.
pids.description_zh: FRP显示发动机燃油轨绝对压力。适用于柴油和比PID $0A和$22压力范围更高的汽油直喷系统。

pids.name: Relative Accelerator Pedal Position
pids.description: Relative or learned pedal position, normalized 0–100%. Displays 0% at learned closed-pedal position. Wide open pedal usually substantially less than 100%. Often average of multiple pedal sensor values.
pids.description_zh: 相对或学习踏板位置，归一化0-100%。在学习关闭位置显示0%。全开踏板通常远低于100%。通常为多个踏板传感器值的平均值。

pids.name: Hybrid Battery Pack Remaining Charge
pids.name_zh: 混合动力电池组剩余电量
pids.description: BAT_PWR shall display the percent remaining level of charge for the hybrid battery pack, expressed as a percentage of full charge (State Of Charge, SOC).
pids.description_zh: BAT_PWR显示混合动力电池组剩余充电百分比，以满电量的百分比表示（荷电状态SOC）。

items.label: BAT_PWR
items.name: Hybrid Battery Pack Remaining Charge
items.name_zh: 混合动力电池组剩余电量

pids.name: Engine Oil Temperature
pids.description: EOT shall display engine oil temperature. May be obtained directly from a sensor or inferred by the control strategy using other sensor inputs.
pids.description_zh: EOT显示发动机机油温度。可直接从传感器获取或由控制策略使用其他传感器输入推算。

pids.name: Fuel Injection Timing
pids.description: FUEL_TIMING shall display the start of the main fuel injection relative to Top Dead Center (TDC). Positive degrees = Before TDC, negative degrees = After TDC.
pids.description_zh: FUEL_TIMING显示主喷油开始相对于上止点(TDC)的角度。正值=上止点前，负值=上止点后。

pids.name: Engine Fuel Rate
pids.description: FUEL_RATE indicates calculated fuel consumed per unit time. Calculated as sum of fuel consumed over last 1000 ms. Updated at minimum 1000 ms rate. Reports 0 L/h when engine not running. PID $9D has replaced PID $5E for PEMS usage.
pids.description_zh: FUEL_RATE指示计算的单位时间燃油消耗量。按最近1000毫秒内消耗的燃油总量计算。至少每1000毫秒更新一次。发动机未运行时报告0 L/h。PID $9D已替代PID $5E用于PEMS。

pids.name: Emission Requirements to Which Vehicle is Designed
pids.name_zh: 车辆设计所满足的排放要求
pids.description: Emission requirements to which vehicle is designed. Previously contained in PID $1C. Currently only HD Euro codes $0E-$11 are defined.
pids.description_zh: 车辆设计所满足的排放要求。此数据此前包含在PID $1C中。目前仅定义了重型欧洲排放代码$0E-$11。
